name: Eliceiri Lab (LOCI)
description: Kevin Eliceiri. UW–Madison. Core drivers of the open bioimaging ecosystem. LOCI leads and maintains key infrastructure including ImageJ2, Fiji, SCIFIO, and SciJava, and founded Bio-Formats. Hosts community platforms (imagej.net, image.sc, fiji.sc) and supports Micro-Manager development. Develops modern tools such as FLIMJ, PyImageJ, Appose, and OpenScan-LSM, alongside CurveAlign/CT-FIRE. Active in open standards, interoperability, and community hackathons across the global imaging community.
